ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tide_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tide prediction record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the prediction is made */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the prediction (e.g., Sat 27) */,
  "low_tide_1_time" TEXT /* Time of the first low tide */,
  "low_tide_1_height" REAL /* Height of the first low tide in feet */,
  "low_tide_2_time" TEXT /* Time of the second low tide */,
  "low_tide_2_height" REAL /* Height of the second low tide in feet */,
  "high_tide_1_time" TEXT /* Time of the first high tide */,
  "high_tide_1_height" REAL /* Height of the first high tide in feet */,
  "high_tide_2_time" TEXT /* Time of the second high tide */,
  "high_tide_2_height" REAL /* Height of the second high tide in feet */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tide_predictions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tide_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the coastal site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_tides" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical tide record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for historical data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical tide data */,
  "low_tide_time" TEXT /* Time of the low tide */,
  "low_tide_height" REAL /* Height of the low tide in feet */,
  "high_tide_time" TEXT /* Time of the high tide */,
  "high_tide_height" REAL /* Height of the high tide in feet */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the recorded tide */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the historical tide data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_tides_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tide prediction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prediction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES tide_predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was generated */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., high tide, low tide, weather alert) */,
  "sent_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model in percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
